caption: A woman with dark hair wearing a striped purple and white shirt and a black headset sits in an indoor setting. She is positioned in front of a plain light-colored wall, with a pale yellow curtain and a blue fabric strip visible to her right. Across the sequence, she is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing as her facial expression shifts slightly from frame to frame. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in white at the bottom left of each individual shot. She remains centered in the frame throughout the clip, maintaining a consistent posture while gesturing slightly with her head as she talks. No other people or objects are visible in the scene.
